message:
feat(bubbletea): Add spinner and textinput examples

Add foundational examples demonstrating core bubbletea concepts:
- spinner.rs: Shows async tick messages and bubbles component composition
- textinput.rs: Demonstrates user input handling and focus management

Also adds bubbles and lipgloss as dev-dependencies for example compilation.

Part of charmed_rust-4px: Port foundational examples.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,6 +15,8 @@ parking_lot = "0.12"
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 criterion.workspace = true
+bubbles = { path = "../bubbles" }
+lipgloss = { path = "../lipgloss" }
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "bubbletea_benchmarks"
